title: Mind Hijack
script_text: ...your subconscious mind! They're already planting seeds. WARNING: Every scroll, every click, it's all tracked. They know your triggers. Your desires. This isn't accidental. It's engineered. SECRET algorithms build your profile. Predict your next move. They want control. To HIJACK your free will. Look at the numbers spinning on your screen right now. Watch them climb. That's *their* power expanding. Not yours. Every purchase, a confirmation of their influence. You think you chose that? Think again. It's an invisible cage. They control the narrative. The market. Your thoughts. Designed to keep you feeding their system. Perpetually manipulating your...
